questions.q: At which level of Meta's hierarchy is the campaign objective selected?
questions.explanation: The objective is always chosen at the Campaign level. Conversion location and event go in the Ad set.

questions.q: Which objectives support the Reservation buying type?
questions.explanation: Reservation is only available for Awareness and Engagement. The rest only support Auction.

questions.q: A B2B company wants scheduled demos with prospects without taking them out of the feed. Which is the best combination?
questions.explanation: Leads + Instant form keeps friction to a minimum inside Meta. Sales is reserved for real transactions.

questions.q: Which objective does NOT require Pixel, CAPI or a dataset?
questions.explanation: Awareness optimizes for recall and broad reach; it does not need conversion tracking.

questions.q: Select the correct difference between conversion event and performance goal.
options: Conversion event = which action counts; Performance goal = how Meta bids
Conversion event goes in Campaign; Performance goal goes in Ad
Performance goal only applies to Sales
questions.explanation: The conversion event defines the action (Purchase, Lead). The performance goal defines the optimization rule (Maximize number vs Maximize value).
